meta.title: Is The Purdue Model Dead?
meta.description: Joel Langill and Brad Hegrat join Dale Peterson to answer this question. The Purdue Model was used as THE MODEL when it came to ICS security, and it worked well in a traditional plant or factory environment. Is this true in the coming world of cloud services, IIoT and other changes? Joel, Brad and Dale discuss and actually reach a mostly common understanding.
